faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in East Flatbush?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in East Flatbush typically ranges from $350 to $2,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and the number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, ensuring transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How can I tell if I have carpenter ants versus regular ants in my East Flatbush home?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ants are significantly larger than common household ants (up to 5/8 inch long) and are typically black or dark brown. You may notice sawdust-like wood shavings near wooden structures, hear faint rustling sounds inside walls, or see large winged ants emerging in spring. Our technicians can positively identify carpenter ants during a free inspection.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a carpenter ant problem in East Flatbush?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout East Flatbush for urgent carpenter ant infestations. Given that carpenter ants can cause progressive structural damage, we prioritize rapid response times to assess the situation and begin treatment as quickly as possible to minimize damage to your home.

faqs.question: Are carpenter ant treatments safe for my family and pets in East Flatbush?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and eco-friendly treatment methods that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We provide clear instructions on any necessary precautions and can schedule treatments at times that minimize disruption to your household while effectively eliminating the carpenter ant colony.
